sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41120" key="e)pisu/mptwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισύμ-πτωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41120.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">falling together,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0643.tlg001:27:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.Lond.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.29</biblScope> </bibl> ; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incidence,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ ἔξωθεν ἐ. τῶν πραγμάτων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Andronic.</author> </bibl> </cit> Rhod.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0111.tlg001:p.570" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.570</biblScope> </bibl> M.</sense> </entryFree>
